functions.title: Guide Book #16

§7Guide Book #16§r
§lDesert Scorpion§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Medium arthropod, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Desert
•§lHealth§r: 16
§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air

•§lPossible drops§r: Scorpion Telson, Raw Arthropod Meat, Spider Eye, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2
•§lMelee effect§r: Poison §o(0:25)§r
•Can climb blocks.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Desert Scorpions strike with venomous precision. Agile and silent, they can scale cliffs and dunes alike, injecting a fast-acting poison that weakens foes quickly. Found prowling beneath the burning sun or creeping through
cold desert nights, they are a constant threat to the unwary.§’
